summary: Matched and linked `src/melee/it/items/itsamusbomb.c` by marking it Matching in `configure.py`, adding its local `ItemStateTable`, adjusting local/static symbol metadata for strings/floats/doubles, making narrow code-shape fixes in `my_sqrtf`, `itSamusbomb_UnkMotion2_Phys`, and `it_802B5478`, and moving baselib includes to angle-bracket style in touched item files. Bot report records 4 new matches for the itsamusbomb unit, including `.data`, `.sdata2`, `itSamusbomb_UnkMotion2_Phys`, and `it_802B5478`.

key_files.role: Primary matched source file; added `ItemStateTable it_803F7220`, adjusted include form, inserted a small stack padding local in `my_sqrtf`, moved `mult` declaration scope, and corrected the first argument to `ftSs_Init_80128A1C` to use the Samus bomb owner.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] report lists itsamusbomb `.data`, `.sdata2`, `itSamusbomb_UnkMotion2_Phys`, and `it_802B5478` as new matches

key_files.role: Build configuration changed `melee/it/items/itsamusbomb.c` from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk near MatchingFor item objects

key_files.role: Symbol metadata changed several itsamusbomb-adjacent data, sdata, and sdata2 entries from global address-style symbols to local labels such as `@244`, `@245`, `@246`, `@165`, `@190`, `@243`, `@247`, `@324`, and `@325`.
Incidental include style adjustment moving `baselib/gobj.h` from quoted include group to angle-bracket baselib include group.

what_changed.text: `ItemStateTable it_803F7220[]` was added to `itsamusbomb.c` with four motion entries for `itSamusbomb_UnkMotion0` through `itSamusbomb_UnkMotion3` callbacks.

Several data-section symbols were reclassified from global address-style names to local labels, including `.data` string `0x803F7260`, `.sdata` strings `0x804D54C8` and `0x804D54D0`, and `.sdata2` float/double entries `0x804DD018` through `0x804DD030`.
`my_sqrtf` added a four-byte initialized local array before `volatile float y`, suggesting a narrow stack-layout/codegen tactic.
`itSamusbomb_UnkMotion2_Phys` moved `f32 mult` declaration from inside the `if` block to function scope before the branch.
`it_802B5478` changed `ftSs_Init_80128A1C` to pass `ip->xDD4_itemVar.samusbomb.owner` instead of the current item `gobj` after checking that owner is non-null.
`baselib/mtx.h` and `baselib/gobj.h` include forms were changed from quoted includes to angle-bracket baselib includes in touched item files.
Bot report records matched-code/link/data progress and 4 new matches for `main/melee/it/items/itsamusbomb`.

smart_moves.text: Kept the matching scope focused on one item translation unit and related metadata/configuration instead of broad item-system churn.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: primary source and configure/symbol metadata changes

smart_moves.text: Used symbol metadata locality for anonymous/local literals and constants rather than adding extra C globals for all exposed addresses.
The callsite in `it_802B5478` aligns the non-null owner check with passing the owner to `ftSs_Init_80128A1C`, making the recovered source more coherent than passing the item gobj there.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When matching an item file, local data ownership may need to be represented in `symbols.txt` with local labels for literals/constants instead of global address-style symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt changes from `it_...` globals to `@...` local labels
text_corpus: bot report `.data` and `.sdata2` new matches for itsamusbomb

decomp_lessons.lesson: For item state tables, adding the concrete `ItemStateTable` array in the owning item source can close data matching for that translation unit when symbol metadata and callbacks line up.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report `main/melee/it/items/itsamusbomb` `.data` moved from 0.00% to 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small declaration-lifetime changes can matter for MWCC matching; here moving `f32 mult` outside the branch is part of the diff that closed `itSamusbomb_UnkMotion2_Phys`.
A narrow stack-layout tactic may be used to close a match, but should stay localized and evidence-backed; this PR uses `u8 _[4] = { 0 };` only inside `my_sqrtf`.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report overall itsamusbomb matching progress

naming_conventions.text: Unproven data symbols were kept as address-style or local-label names (`it_803F7220`, `@244`, `@245`, etc.) rather than being given speculative semantic names.
Local variables in touched item code use short role names already common in the file: `gobj`, `ip`, `attr`, `mult`, and `parent_gobj`.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Promote the object to Matching only after the source and metadata changes produced reported new matches.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists 4 new matches

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use local labels in `symbols.txt` for TU-local strings/floats/doubles to match section ownership and local symbol scope.
Recover the item state table as C data in the item source.
Adjust local stack shape with a small initialized `u8 _[4]` padding array in `my_sqrtf`.
Move local declaration scope for `mult` before the branch to influence codegen in `itSamusbomb_UnkMotion2_Phys`.
Correct a recovered call argument from item gobj to stored owner gobj in `it_802B5478`.

follow_up_queries: my_sqrtf u8 _[4] volatile float y matching

accepted_candidate_records.title: Item TU matching may require local symbol metadata, not C globals
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2214 matched `itsamusbomb` partly by changing several `.data`, `.sdata`, and `.sdata2` entries in `config/GALE01/symbols.txt` from global address-style names to local labels, while adding only the supported `ItemStateTable` in source.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report `.data` and `.sdata2` new matches

accepted_candidate_records.title: Declaration placement can close near-matching item physics functions
accepted_candidate_records.text: In `itSamusbomb_UnkMotion2_Phys`, moving `f32 mult` out of the inner `if` block is part of the PR diff associated with the bot-reported move from 99.96% to 100.00%. Treat this as a narrow codegen tactic, not a general style rule.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Owner-gobj call argument fixed in Samus bomb cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: `it_802B5478` checks `ip->xDD4_itemVar.samusbomb.owner != NULL` and then passes that owner to `ftSs_Init_80128A1C`, replacing the previous item `gobj` argument. Bot report shows this function reached 100.00%.
